caption: A person is working on a vehicle's electrical system, focusing on a fuse box located behind a plastic panel. The scene starts with a close-up of the fuse box containing various multicolored fuses and a red wire trailing out. As the sequence progresses, the view shifts downward toward a brown carpeted area beneath the panel. A hand enters the frame, holding a small yellow fuse. In the final frame, the hand is shown holding a small, grey rectangular component, which has replaced the yellow fuse. The setting is a confined space within a car, characterized by dark grey plastic molding, beige interior panels, and brown carpeting. No text, logos, or other people are visible in the footage.
